allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=[e for e in d if e.get\('gameVersion',''\).startswith\('26.'\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(f\\"{e['version']} \(stable={e.get\('stable'\)}, build={e.get\('build'\)}\)\\" for e in v[:20]\)\)")
